title: Solar Energy Systems Engineers
description: Perform site-specific engineering analysis or evaluation of energy efficiency and solar projects involving residential, commercial, or industrial customers. Design solar domestic hot water and space heating systems for new and existing structures, applying knowledge of structural energy requirements, local climates, solar technology, and thermodynamics.

tasks.text: Conduct engineering site audits to collect structural, electrical, and related site information for use in the design of residential or commercial solar power systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create plans for solar energy system development, monitoring, and evaluation activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or coordinate design of photovoltaic (PV) or solar thermal systems, including system components, for residential and commercial buildings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical direction or support to installation teams during installation, start-up, testing, system commissioning, or performance monitoring.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create electrical single-line diagrams, panel schedules, or connection diagrams for solar electric systems, using computer-aided design (CAD) software.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform computer simulation of solar photovoltaic (PV) generation system performance or energy production to optimize efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review specifications and recommend engineering or manufacturing changes to achieve solar design objectives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop design specifications and functional requirements for residential, commercial, or industrial solar energy systems or components.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop standard operation procedures and quality or safety standards for solar installation work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create checklists for review or inspection of completed solar installation projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Perform thermal, stress, or cost reduction analyses for solar systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test or evaluate photovoltaic (PV) cells or modules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design or develop vacuum tube collector systems for solar applications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
